title: WP_PAGE_1011_TERMOSAUNA_TRANSLATION_2026-06-05.md
text:
# WP Page 1011 Termosauna Translation - 2026-06-05

## Scope
- Page: `https://www.skinharmony.it/termosauna/`
- WordPress post ID: `1011`
- Languages: `en`, `fr`, `de`, `es`
- Method: SkinHarmony Core Translator REST workflow with Core Codex Connector gate.

## Core / Nyra Gate
- Action type: `publish`
- Verdict: `ALLOWED`
- Risk: `low`
- Owner confirmation: `false`
- Report: `reports/codex-core/codex_core_gate_latest.json`

## Translation Run
- Provider status: OK
- Provider: `openai`
- Model: `gpt-4.1-mini`
- Page strings extracted: `90`
- Batch command: `SH_TRANSLATE_LANGS=en,fr,de,es SH_TRANSLATE_BLOCK_SIZE=10 node scripts/translate_wp_site_stepwise.js 1011`
- Batch report: `reports/wp_site_translation_stepwise_2026-06-05.json`
- Result: `90/90` generated for each target language.

## Runtime Verification
- Public routes returned `200`:
  - `https://www.skinharmony.it/en/termosauna/`
  - `https://www.skinharmony.it/fr/termosauna/`
  - `https://www.skinharmony.it/de/termosauna/`
  - `https://www.skinharmony.it/es/termosauna/`
- Sample runtime lookups via `site/translation-item` returned translated text for the first checked strings on all four target languages.
- Public HTML retained the translated structure and did not block on the Italian source route.

## Boundaries
- Italian source content was not modified.
- No price changes.
- No numeric technical specification changes.
- No plugin code changes.
- No tenant, key, checkout, CRM or customer data changes.
